name: harness-engineering-skills
description: Two-agent engineering workflow skills for generator/evaluator development and audit handovers.

interface.shortDescription: Generator and evaluator workflow with handover memory
interface.longDescription: Install this plugin to run a two-agent workflow: generator builds, evaluator audits, and both synchronize through local and public handover files.
defaultPrompt: Start generator mode and prepare implementation context
Start evaluator mode and run ordered audits with tests
Publish shared handover summary after audits pass
